final_response_preview:
All 48 tests pass. Here's a summary of the 4 bugs fixed:

| # | File | Bug | Fix |
|---|------|-----|-----|
| 1 | `tokenizer.py` | String token values included surrounding quotes | Strip outer quotes; remove `\X` escape sequences from stored value |
| 2 | `evaluator.py` | `d.name` dot access on dicts raised `EvalError` | Check `isinstance(o, dict) and name in o` before `getattr` |
| 3 | `evaluator.py` | `map`/`filter` builtins crashed with `UserFunction` | Added `_call()` helper that handles bot
